text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Immigration/Naturalization Adjudication Services 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOMELAND SECURITY UNITED STATES CUSTOMS BORDER PROTECTION I-94 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Government agency for international travelers visiting the United States where they can apply for or retrieve their I-94 admission number and record (proof of legal visitor status) and retrieve a limited travel history of their US arrivals and departures. 1300 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, MS: 1345 Ipl/cbp Info Center Washington, DC 20229 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-3pm, closed federal holidays (877) 227-5111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE USCIS FIELD OFFICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Field office of the federal agency that oversees immigration to the United States. Processes applications for naturalization, citizenship, and permanent resident status. 1455 NW Overton Street Suite 1 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment (800) 375-5283 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES USCIS FIELD OFFICES
